title: Googlesheets and Monday.com with Zapier
excerpt: I would like to sync my googlesheets with monday.com using zapier. I want to be able to make updates to my google sheets that automatically update my monday.com board. I know with zapier I have to use monday API, but I’m…

posts.author: deryann (Bank Ade)
posts.cookedHtml:
I would like to sync my googlesheets with monday.com using zapier. I want to be able to make updates to my google sheets that automatically update my monday.com board. I know with zapier I have to use monday API, but I’m a little confused with how to go about doing that.

Does anyone have the exact zapier process that I can use to create this integration? Or can anyone provide support with using zapier for this integration?

Thank you!

posts.author: jebank (Jacob Bank)
posts.cookedHtml:
While Zapier isn’t built for 2 way sync, you should be able to set up an integration that makes updates in Monday based on a google sheet by setting up something here: Connect your Google Sheets to monday.com integration in 2 minutes | Zapier.

If you’re open to an alternative, I work on Relay.app and we can definitely set this up for you.
